publishedAbstract: * CephFS PVCs never bind and/or are stuck pending * CephFS PVC shows the following error ~~~ omap value cephfs_metadata/csi.volumes.default/csi.volume.pvc-1ac0c6e6-9428-445d-bbd6-1284d54ddb47: (1) Operation not permitted ~~~
publishedTitle: CephFS PVCs fails to bind in OpenShift Container Storage External Mode
